soft_bridal_windowlight.description: Warm natural window light, cream interiors, lace or bridal fabrics, shallow depth, romantic and serene.
soft_bridal_windowlight.lighting: large soft window light from one side, creamy highlights, gentle shadow falloff
soft_bridal_windowlight.grade: warm ivory, soft gold, low contrast, delicate film grain

soft_korean_beauty_drama.description: Clean emotional beauty-drama look, soft face light, warm bokeh, intimate lensing.
soft_korean_beauty_drama.lighting: soft directional daylight, smooth skin highlights, quiet ambient fill
soft_korean_beauty_drama.grade: warm neutral skin tones, gentle green-beige background softness

cinematic_wedding_editorial.description: Elegant bridal editorial video with lace details, reflective highlights, and room geometry.
cinematic_wedding_editorial.lighting: side window glow with bright curtains and soft room bounce
cinematic_wedding_editorial.grade: creamy white, champagne highlights, soft contrast

warm_orange_studio_beauty.description: Seamless orange studio portrait, gold wardrobe, polished commercial beauty.
warm_orange_studio_beauty.lighting: large diffused frontal key slightly above camera, subtle falloff on backdrop
warm_orange_studio_beauty.grade: amber copper warmth, satin highlights, refined skin

hard_flash_fashion_editorial.description: Direct fashion flash, shiny skin, strong exposure, crisp shadows, magazine editorial.
hard_flash_fashion_editorial.lighting: hard direct flash concentrated on subject with visible edge falloff
hard_flash_fashion_editorial.grade: overexposed flash highlights, saturated color, visible film grain

vintage_fuji_velvia_flash.description: Oversaturated film-flash look, high color density, hard reflections and grain.
vintage_fuji_velvia_flash.lighting: hard on-camera flash with concentrated center brightness
vintage_fuji_velvia_flash.grade: Fuji Velvia-inspired saturation, heavy grain, glossy skin

neo_noir_reflection.description: Dark reflective interiors, colored practicals, moody controlled highlights.
neo_noir_reflection.lighting: low-key motivated side light with reflective accents
neo_noir_reflection.grade: cool shadows, warm highlights, high contrast

rainy_window_melancholy.description: Soft rain-streaked window, reflective mood, intimate stillness.
rainy_window_melancholy.lighting: diffused gray daylight through wet glass
rainy_window_melancholy.grade: cool beige, soft contrast, subdued saturation

macro_fashion_texture_study.description: Extreme close-up study of lace, satin, jewelry, skin, hair, or fabric detail.
macro_fashion_texture_study.grade: tactile microcontrast, shallow focus, elegant highlights

wide_environmental_editorial.description: Full environment reveal, room geometry, balanced composition, cinematic stillness.
wide_environmental_editorial.lighting: motivated natural light with soft spatial falloff

movement_presets.slow_push_in: Camera gently pushes closer toward the subject, increasing intimacy without changing identity or wardrobe.
movement_presets.slow_pull_back: Camera gently pulls back to reveal wardrobe and environment while preserving the same pose language.
movement_presets.arc_orbit_15_degrees: Camera orbits subtly around the subject by about 15 degrees, creating parallax while maintaining continuity.
movement_presets.arc_orbit_45_degrees: Camera moves from a frontal or three-quarter angle toward a stronger three-quarter/profile view.
movement_presets.crane_down_to_close: Camera begins higher and descends toward an intimate portrait angle.
movement_presets.crane_up_to_wide: Camera rises and widens to reveal body posture and environment.
movement_presets.low_angle_rise: Camera begins low and rises slightly, elongating the silhouette.
movement_presets.profile_to_three_quarter: Subject or camera changes from side profile into a three-quarter view.
movement_presets.rack_focus_foreground_to_face: Focus begins on foreground texture or fabric and resolves on the subject's eyes.
movement_presets.macro_detail_to_portrait: Begins on a detail such as lace, satin, lips, eye, or hand and reveals the portrait.
movement_presets.portrait_to_macro_detail: Begins as a portrait and settles on a material or beauty detail.
movement_presets.handheld_breathing_intimate: Very subtle handheld micro-movement, intimate and natural, no aggressive shake.
movement_presets.parallax_window_reveal: Camera moves laterally so window curtains, mirror, or foreground edges reveal the subject.

wide_to_close.start: wide or full-body composition showing environment and wardrobe
wide_to_close.stop: intimate close-up on face or upper torso

close_to_wide.stop: wider shot revealing body posture and room geometry

profile_to_front.stop: front or three-quarter portrait with gaze toward camera

detail_to_face.start: macro texture detail such as lace, satin, eye, lips, hand, or hair
